text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Two other Umamusume debut several<n>months
after Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As both friends and worthy rivals,<n>Narita Taishin
believes in them, and<n>the three all have their sights
set on<n>the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's determined not to<n>lose and throws
herself into training<n>to prepare for the inevitable
battles<n>against her companions.
